prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约5950→5875→7812→11329→4665名。2021–2022年基本稳定在5900名附近，2023年明显后移至7812名，2024年进一步后移至11329名，2025年因考试模式由"理科"改为"物理类"且招生专业组调整，位次大幅前移至4665名，波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约4665名；本省该科类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年18人、2023年20人、2024年32人、2025年31人；2026年计划46人，较2025年扩招约48%，扩招幅度显著，按供需弹性原理将导致最低录取位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第28名（大连理工大学），排名稳定，属于国内顶尖工科院校。盘锦校区与主校共享985平台，但社会认知度略低于主校；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及录取断档信号），但主要针对大连理工大学主校电信学部2023年断档事件，对盘锦校区直接影响有限；抖音热度评价为"较热"，综合热度排名第55，短视频曝光处于中上水平，报考关注度一般。历史投档异常方面，2023年大连理工大学电信学部曾出现断档至60000名的情况，但盘锦校区未出现类似极端信号；大连理工大学拥有化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等A-及以上学科10个。盘锦校区招生专业中，能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术A+，经济学类对应工商管理A，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程、智能海洋装备等工科专业社会热度平稳；经济学类属经管大类，近年热度有所降温。本省2026年普通高考总人数约15.4万人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约11.08万人，较2025年8.37万人增长约32%，考生规模大幅增加将加剧竞争，对位次有前移压力。；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，与内蒙古自治区相邻，地域偏好较强，内蒙古考生对东北高校接受度较高。该校在内蒙古招生计划占比较小，2025年31人，2026年扩至46人，扩招后占比有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4665名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招48%（推动位次后移）、本省物理类考生增长约32%（推动位次前移）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，供需弹性主值计算得约6019名。考虑考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧效应。预测2026年最低录取位次约5969名，区间5469–6469名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 智能海洋装备。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（含电子商务、经济学）
- 生物信息学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物制造。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5469–6469名内的考生，建议以二档经济学类为主力填报，一档能源化学工程可冲刺（该专业对应A+学科，历年位次最优），三档生物制造等作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5469名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>6469名）建议以三档为主，谨慎冲二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 5950 → 5875 → 7812 → 11329 → 4665. In 2021–2022, it was basically stable around 5900, significantly shifted back to 7812 in 2023, further shifted back to 11329 in 2024, and in 2025, due to the change of exam mode from "Science" to "Physics Category" and adjustment of enrollment major groups, the ranking moved forward significantly to 4665, with drastic fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4665; the enrollment plan for this subject category in the province: 20 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 46, an increase of about 48% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, which according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity will cause the minimum admission ranking to shift back noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Dalian University of Technology), with stable ranking, belonging to top domestic engineering universities. The Panjin Campus shares the 985 platform with the main campus, but its social recognition is slightly lower than the main campus; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (involving signals of admission cutoff drops), but mainly targeting the 2023 cutoff drop incident of the Electronic Information Department of the main campus of Dalian University of Technology, with limited direct impact on the Panjin Campus; Douyin popularity evaluation is "relatively hot", with a comprehensive popularity ranking of 55, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and general application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, in 2023, the Electronic Information Department of Dalian University of Technology experienced a cutoff drop to 60000, but the Panjin Campus did not show similar extreme signals; Dalian University of Technology has 10 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc. Among the majors enrolled at the Panjin Campus, Energy Chemical Engineering corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, and Economics category corresponds to Business Administration A, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering and Intelligent Marine Equipment have stable social popularity; the Economics category belongs to the economics and management category, which has seen some cooling in popularity in recent years. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 72% in recent years, resulting in about 110,800 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 32% compared to 83,700 in 2025. The significant increase in the number of candidates will intensify competition, exerting pressure for rankings to move forward. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, adjacent to Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, with strong regional preference; Inner Mongolia candidates have a high acceptance of universities in Northeast China. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia accounts for a small proportion, with 31 in 2025 and expanding to 46 in 2026, with the proportion increasing after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4665, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 48% (pushing rankings back), the increase in Physics Category candidates in the province by about 32% (pushing rankings forward), and stable school reputation, the main value of supply-demand elasticity calculates to about 6019. Considering the intensified competition effect due to the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 5969, with a range of 5469–6469.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics Category (including E-commerce, Economics)
- Bioinformatics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 5469–6469, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics Category as the main choice, with Tier 1 Energy Chemical Engineering as a reach (this major corresponds to an A+ discipline, with historically optimal rankings), and Tier 3 Biomanufacturing as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5469) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>6469) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3, and cautiously reach for Tier 2.
